assertions: Exit status was 0 and stdout is a single line that JSON.parse parses to `{}`.
Stdout holds only hook JSON ending with newline; no askQuestion was emitted from the hook binary.

primitive_analysis.summary: Session-start runs node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs and emits either `{}` when there is nothing to say or JSON with additional_context advising `/z-eval-execute`, `/z-eval-update`, or similar when stale run folders, skills without evals.json, or a daily drift reminder apply.
fixture_justifications: Forces loadYamlConfig to return undefined so the hook takes the documented early quiet `{}` stdout path documented alongside the richer nudge paths.

assertions: Exit status was 0 and stdout is JSON whose `additional_context` names the deficit and urges `/z-eval-update`.
The aggregated message counts at least one skill directory lacking evals/evals.json and aligns with workflow-capture-kit being among the deficits.

primitive_analysis.summary: Session-start runs node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs and emits either `{}` when there is nothing to say or JSON with additional_context advising `/z-eval-execute`, `/z-eval-update`, or similar when stale run folders, skills without evals.json, or a daily drift reminder apply.

Produces the documented SKILL.md-without-evals/evals.json tree the missingEval scan reports.

files.content:
# Workflow capture kit

Checklist-backed workflow capture steps.

cases.expected_output: Hook stdout publishes additional_context reminding the operator that skills need eval stubs and pointing them at `/z-eval-update`.

cases.prompt: sessionStart executes `node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs` where config.yml parses cleanly, `.zoto/eval-system/manifest.yml` exists relative to workspace, and `.zoto/eval-system/.last-drift-check` does not yet exist under the sandbox so markerShouldRun is true before the invocation.
assertions: Hook stdout parses as JSON and `additional_context` includes the `/z-eval-update` drift nudge spelled out when the manifest file is readable.
After the hook ends, `.zoto/eval-system/.last-drift-check` exists beside manifest.yml under the sandbox and its UTF-8 body matches an RFC 3339 style ISO timestamp.
Exit status stays 0 and no askQuestion was emitted from the hook binary.

primitive_analysis.summary: Session-start runs node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs and emits either `{}` when there is nothing to say or JSON with additional_context advising `/z-eval-execute`, `/z-eval-update`, or similar when stale run folders, skills without evals.json, or a daily drift reminder apply.
fixture_justifications: Keeps hooks off the `{}` silent path once configuration is nominally initialized.
Gives manifest.yml presence so the once-per-interval drift reminder documented in hooks.json fires from this session-start hook instead of exiting quietly.

files.content:
version: 1
targets:
  - id: hook:zoto-eval-system
    kind: hook

cases.expected_output: Stdout surfaces the drift checklist line alongside `/z-eval-update`, while the sandbox records a fresh drift-check marker file stamped with UTC time.

cases.prompt: sessionStart invokes `node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs` after fixture staging lays down `workspace/evals/_runs/archived-batch/` beneath the sandbox and sets that directory modification time so it lands at least fourteen days before invocation (while config.yml defaults evals routing to evals/).
assertions: Stdout stays valid Cursor hook JSON and, when the aged-directory precondition is met, `additional_context` states at least one run directory crossed the fourteen-day threshold and cites `/z-eval-execute`.
Exit status stays 0 and no askQuestion was emitted from the hook binary.

primitive_analysis.summary: Session-start runs node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs and emits either `{}` when there is nothing to say or JSON with additional_context advising `/z-eval-execute`, `/z-eval-update`, or similar when stale run folders, skills without evals.json, or a daily drift reminder apply.
fixture_justifications: Pins evalsDir to evals so staleRuns examines workspace/evals/_runs.
Ensures a concrete child directory exists for the staleness heuristic once the sandbox ages its mtime.

cases.expected_output: Hook stdout highlights stale `_runs/` inventory and urges `/z-eval-execute` cleanup when directories exceed fourteen days relative to invocation time.
